highlights.headline: Knicks demolish 76ers for sweep
highlights.description: Knicks shoot the lights out in a huge win over the 76ers for a sweep.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks demolish 76ers for sweep) 2026/05/10 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson, Josh Hart and the New York Knicks are back in the Eastern Conference finals, tying the NBA postseason record with 25 3-pointers in front of a raucous crowd
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks bury 76ers 144-114 behind Game 4 3-point barrage, back in East finals for 2nd straight year

headlines.description: — Anthony Edwards had 16 of his 36 points in the fourth quarter to help the Minnesota Timberwolves even their second-round NBA playoff series against the San Antonio Spurs with a 114-109 victory, following the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Edwards guides the Timberwolves past the Spurs 114-109 to tie the series after Wembanyama's ejection
